decision.summary: Hold the existing weekly 74k reach position and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The open weekly `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-april-6-12` Yes position is only at 54.5%, so it is well below the 90-95% take-profit zone, and the early-stage playbook says positions are held until take-profit or natural resolution. The latest Beecthor transcript and summaries have shifted the active thesis back bearish unless recent highs break, while Binance at 73043.16 is still range-high and not confirming a clean downside move. That leaves no valid new edge: the nearest bearish daily line below spot, 72k on April 11, is only 6.1% and too discounted, while the nearest bullish daily line above spot, 74k on April 11, conflicts with the current thesis and is only 9.5%.
